name: Mistral Medium 3
note: Cost-efficient closed frontier model claimed at ~90% of Claude 3.7 Sonnet across benchmarks, 8x cheaper.

results.notes: Independent third-party eval by Vals AI of mistral-medium-2505 (release date 5/7/2025, price $0.4/$2, 131k context — all match this corpus entry). Vals AI labels the model 'Mistral Medium 3.1 (05/2025)' in their own versioning scheme but the model ID, price, and release date confirm this is Mistral Medium 3 (mistral-medium-2505). Score with ±1.15 std error, ranked 106/127 on their leaderboard at time of eval.
Independent Vals AI eval, ±0.42 std error, ranked 95/120.
Independent Vals AI eval, ±1.16 std error, ranked 70/82.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via mistral.ai/news/mistral-medium-3/ (fetched directly, dated 2025-05-07, pricing '$0.4 input / $2 output per M token', claim 'performs at or above 90% of Claude Sonnet 3.7 on benchmarks across the board' — matches note verbatim in substance). AA Intelligence Index score of 12 confirmed literally on artificialanalysis.ai/models/mistral-medium-3. Deprecation date 2026-05-22 confirmed via docs.mistral.ai/models/overview legacy table (deprecation 5/22/2026, retirement 8/31/2026).
